page: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Esv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and bundled GPUs, but is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate strong capabilities across multiple domains. The server achieves top-tier performance in Geekbench image processing and strong performance in Geekbench single-core, multi-core, software compilation, and ray tracing tests. Memory bandwidth for read-only operations is strong, though the Passmark memory score falls into the weak category. In cryptographic and compression tests, the processor's AVX-512 and AMX instruction sets support strong performance in Passmark CPU encryption and multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression.

This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics. Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput both rank in the top 25 percent. For machine learning, the server demonstrates strong prompt processing speeds across small, medium, and large LLM models, though text generation speeds drop to average. The absence of local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this server as a cost-efficient option for memory-heavy enterprise applications that rely on external network-attached storage rather than local NVMe drives.
description: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. Built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It contains no local storage or GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show strong performance in Geekbench multi-core, software compilation, and image processing, alongside strong read-only memory bandwidth. However, Passmark memory scores are weak. The server is suited for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including database operations, in-memory caching, and medium-scale LLM prompt processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and no local storage, running on Hyper-V.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM without local storage.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 48 dedicated vCPUs and 24 physical cores
384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Strong performance in Geekbench image processing and multi-core benchmarks
Weak Passmark memory score despite strong read-only memory bandwidth
Suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, and LLM prompt processing
